title: Argo accepted-slice ledger — what has actually landed, under whose acceptance

accepted.acceptance_note: accepted by The Eye with a deferred minor-fix backlog per the stopping rule ('finish the round it's on; start a minor-fix artifact list to revisit outside feature development'); codex remained a lone 'revise' after 13 rounds mining an asymptotically-shrinking tail
accepted.review_context: review judged against plan v13 under authz-006 (the governing authority at review time); v15/authz-008 later extended authz-006 without re-reviewing 4a

accepted.acceptance_note: harvested from origin/clotho-task4b under The Eye's 'finish Clotho' directive (2026-07-17); the branch carried the 13-file 4b implementation with its gauntlet oracles and council hard-stop resolutions (H1/H2); entry ritual GRANTED 13/13 before any work; oracles at landing: clotho npm test 10/10, verify-contracts 188/188, build-gate regression green; acceptance path = PR #126 review + CI + The Eye's merge decision
accepted.review_context: no fresh signed-council slice review was run for the harvest — the harvested branch's own lineage records its council findings and hard-stop resolutions; recorded honestly rather than staged

accepted.acceptance_note: three parallel disjoint-writer build agents (Q: query+oracle, W: driver+oracle+inventory+closure, A: advisory) per the LIVE Daedalus-matured approach; each oracle green in its worktree before merge; integration single-writer; first real-repository weave published as the Task 5 exit; oracles at landing: clotho 13/13, verify-contracts 203/203, build-gate green
accepted.review_context: approach extensively reviewed pre-implementation by the live slice-5 Daedalus workshop (claude-fable-5 authored, gpt-5.6-sol bound; docs/runs/clotho-slice5-daedalus/)

accepted.acceptance_note: single-writer agent per evaluation #2; ESCALATED mid-flight on genuine plan-vs-repository contradiction (three groups without ground truth), committed nothing, resumed after The Eye reviewed-data ruling and delivered green: 26 hand-audited expectations across all eight groups, published unscored 76-fact review set, both weaves under ceiling, mutation checks discriminating; oracles at landing: clotho 14/14, verify-contracts 207/207
accepted.review_context: approach matured by the live slice-6 Daedalus workshop (converged r1); the escalation record and Eye ruling are docs/runs/clotho-impl-slice-6/ESCALATION.md + commit 1596767

why: The Argo ledger is the honest answer to 'what has actually been implemented and accepted' — one slice (4a), 13 signed review rounds, a deterministic slice gate at meets, and an acceptance that DEFERRED known minors rather than pretending zero defects. A future model must read the backlog as part of the acceptance, not as contradicting it.
change_rule: A new accepted slice appends an entry (slice gate meets -> signed required-seat review -> The Eye's acceptance -> merge; update CURRENT-AUTHORITY.json + this contract in the same change or verify-contracts fails). Entries are never rewritten.

oracle.contract_equals_code: docs/institutional-memory/verify-contracts.mjs (deep-equals holder/governs/accepted/next/pending against CURRENT-AUTHORITY; asserts the final review record, slice gate meets, and the deferred backlog exist and match; asserts per-task query files exist for every pending slice)
